hero.title: Business software that gives workshops, trades and hospitality their day back.
hero.subtitle: For over two decades we've been installing, training and supporting Swiss SMEs with SwissGarage, SwissOffice and ForrerGastro. One point of contact. No ticketing queue. No runaround.

pillars.title: What we take off your plate.

items.label: IT
items.text: Workstations, servers, backups, licensing. Done right the first time.

items.label: Admin
items.text: Quote, order, QR invoice, ledger. One flow, no re-typing.

items.label: Network
items.text: Wi-Fi and wiring that still works when you need it on Saturday.

softwareTeaser.title: Three products. One philosophy: everything connects.

items.title: SwissGarage
items.tagline: Orders, parts, invoicing, vehicle sales. The shop-floor software for Swiss garages.

items.title: SwissOffice
items.tagline: Quotes, invoices, stock, bookkeeping. For trades and service businesses.

items.title: ForrerGastro
items.tagline: Service on a tablet, closing on the database. Hospitality without the gaps.

servicesTeaser.title: We don't just install. We stay.
servicesTeaser.text: On-site or TeamViewer demos. Training around your workflow. Coaching until the team is fluent. Support that actually helps on the first call.

referencesPreview.title: Running every day at Swiss SMEs for years.

supportHours.title: Available when you need us.
supportHours.note: Outside these hours, email us – we reply the next working day.

services.title: Services
services.intro: The gap between software and your day-to-day. We close it.

swissgarage.title: SwissGarage & SwissOffice
swissgarage.tagline: Installation, training and ongoing support around our shop-floor software.
bullets: Training on specific topics or features
Coaching until your team is confident

admin.title: Administration & Process Coaching
admin.tagline: Lifting admin off your team – from job creation to insurance billing.
bullets: Parts orders pulled straight into the job
Archiving vehicles, customers, invoices, debtors, creditors
Insurance billing with deductibles and VAT handling

software.title: Software
software.intro: Three products built for specific industries. One data model, from contact to ledger.

swissgarage.title: SwissGarage
swissgarage.tagline: The complete solution for Swiss garages.
swissgarage.description: Addresses, orders, parts imports, invoicing and vehicle trading in one interface. Parts pulled directly from Derendinger, Hostettler, ESA, Rhiag and MCL. Leasing and insurance cases run cleanly. QR invoices post automatically to the debtor.
features: Parts imports: Derendinger, Hostettler, ESA, Rhiag, MCL
QR invoice with automatic debtor posting
Integrated accounting with VAT, debtors, creditors

swissoffice.title: SwissOffice
swissoffice.description: Quotes, invoices, stock, accounting – one interface, no spreadsheet detours. QR invoices post themselves. Multi-user included.
features: QR invoice with automatic debtor posting

forrergastro.title: ForrerGastro
forrergastro.description: Database on a PC, service on iOS or Android tablets (8" and up). Closing posts every revenue type automatically – cash, cards, vouchers. Kitchen and bar print to your rules.
features: Daily closing with automatic posting of all revenue types
QR receipt with automatic debtor posting
Contact and address management with import

rows.label: ForrerGastro
rows.value: Windows PC as database · iOS or Android 8" and up as service device · over Wi-Fi

references.title: Clients
references.intro: A selection of businesses running our software every working day.
references.cta: Your business isn't on the list? Get in touch.

sponsoring.title: Sponsoring
sponsoring.intro: We back the people and places that make Winterthur and the region tick – in sport, and in the trades.

kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.intro: During office hours we reply within minutes. Or stop by in Winterthur.

fernwartung.title: Remote support
fernwartung.text: Download TeamViewer Quicksupport, run the file, then share the ID shown on your screen. We'll be with you in seconds.

footer.description: Software, training and support for workshops, trades and hospitality. Based in Winterthur.

body.heading: Disclaimer
paragraphs: The author makes no warranty as to the timeliness, correctness, completeness or quality of the information provided. Liability claims for damages of any kind arising from the use or non-use of the information offered are excluded.

body.heading: Copyright
paragraphs: Copyright and all other rights to content, images, photos or other files on this website belong exclusively to Consultec Heiniger or the specifically named rights holders.

body.heading: Overview
paragraphs: Consultec Heiniger takes the protection of your personal data seriously. Personal data is handled in line with the Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection (FADP).

body.heading: Collection and processing
paragraphs: We process data only where necessary for performing a contract, delivering a service or meeting legal obligations. Data is shared with third parties only to the extent required for those purposes.

body.heading: Server log files
paragraphs: When you visit the website, the server automatically records technical data such as IP address, browser type and access time. This data cannot be attributed to an individual and is used only for security and operational purposes.

body.heading: Your rights
paragraphs: You have the right to access, correct, delete and restrict the processing of your personal data. For any request, email info@consultec.swiss.
